name: WP-S13-config-correctness: env-binding isolation + 2 background-job correctness bugs
description: Three small, unrelated fixes batched as one PR-sized sweep. Findings: F-094 (env bindings stored in module-level singletons can bleed across concurrent function runs within one Cloudflare isolate — scope per-invocation) · F-162 (self-reinvoke cursor advances past profiles that errored mid-run, silently dropping them — cursor must not skip errored profiles; ruled at activation to STAY in PRG-13 per charter OQ2) · F-174 (recall-quality LLM grade computed BEFORE the cooldown claim, wasting a paid LLM call when the claim fails — reorder claim before grade). Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label security-pii-inngest).
acceptanceCriteria: Per-invocation env resolution at the F-094 sites (no module-level binding singletons); errored profiles are retained/retried by the cursor (test reproducing the skip, then green); cooldown claim precedes the LLM grade call (test asserting no LLM call on failed claim); regression test per finding.
riskImpact: S / isolated fixes; F-162 touches data-completeness semantics — test-first.
bodyText:
Bundle brief — WP-S13-config-correctness
Rationale
Three small, unrelated background-job defects from the 2026-05-29 full audit (label security-pii-inngest), batched as one PR-sized sweep because each is too small to carry its own PR overhead: a config-isolation hazard (F-094) and two correctness bugs (F-162 silent data drop, F-174 wasted paid LLM spend). F-162 was ruled at activation to stay in PRG-13 rather than export to PRG-11 (charter OQ2).
Strategy
Three independent surgical fixes, one branch, one PR. Test-first for each (the WP risk note flags F-162's data-completeness semantics specifically). No shared abstraction — these do not deserve one. Fresh-grep every site at plan time; audit line numbers may have drifted.
Scope
In: the three findings below. Out: everything PII-egress-shaped (WI-665), the chronic Deploy-workflow staging failure (WI-664), and any broader env-injection refactor beyond the concrete F-094 singleton sites.
Findings table
Bundle Acceptance Criteria
Per-invocation env resolution at every F-094 site; no module-level binding singletons remain.
Errored profiles are retained/retried by the backfill cursor — test reproducing the skip written first (red), then green.
Cooldown claim precedes the LLM grade call; test asserts no LLM call when the claim fails; successful-claim behavior unchanged. (Note: WI-234/PR #415 fixed a related earlier manifestation in retention-data.ts — this closes the remaining in-function ordering gap.)
Regression test per finding; existing behavior otherwise unchanged; one PR for the WP.
